steps.title: 1.Enter Amount & Select Payment
steps.description: Enter the amount, select the available payment method, and choose the payment account or bind the payment card.

steps.title: 2.Confirm Order
steps.description: Confirmation of transaction detail information, including trading pair quotes, fees, and other explanatory tips.

steps.title: 3.Receive Crypto
steps.description: After successful payment, the purchased crypto will be deposited into your Spot or Funding Wallet.
